script: 104 miles per hour in a 40 mph zone is the staggering speed a youth pastor was driving before slamming into a concrete pole and killing his 8-year-old daughter, according to police. Leiniz, the former youth pastor, had three kids in the car when he lost control, and his reckless driving has left a family shattered. The details of this case are still emerging, but one thing is clear: the pastor's actions that day were catastrophic, and the consequences will be felt for a long time.
